title: Oil India – Heavy Motor Vehicle Operator – 16 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Oil India Heavy Motor Vehicle Operator Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 16 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Oil India Recruitment 2026 for 16 posts of Contractual Heavy Motor Vehicle (HMV) Operator. Candidates with 10+2 pass can attend Walkin. The Walk-in on 25-05-2026. For detailed information please visit Oil India official website oil-india.com.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18 years, Max: Gen: 40 years, OBC-NCL: 43 years, SC/ST: 45 years

qualification.education_qualification: 10+2 pass, valid Professional Heavy Motor Vehicle Driving Licence (TRANS category) issued at least 4 years ago, and minimum 3 years of work experience in driving heavy vehicles.

seo_tags: Oil India Contractual Heavy Motor Vehicle (HMV) Operator Recruitment 2026
